summary: All bug fixes and new features verified successfully. (1) Stripe cancel_url correctly redirects to /settings instead of /pricing - verified in backend code at lines 2453 and 3434. (2) Affiliate section shows 'Embed Code for Your Website / CMS' with copyable HTML embed code containing user's referral link. (3) Social Media Assets section shows 3 downloadable images (Banner 1536x1024, Story 1024x1536, Square 1024x1024). (4) All Settings tabs present (Profile, Organization, Team & Invites, Billing & Invoices, Integrations, Mobile App). (5) Support page works inside DashboardLayout when logged in.

Feature: Download asset button 1 (Story 1024x1536) present with data-testid='download-asset-1'

Regression: Settings page 'Mobile App' tab present

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All affiliate features working, all Settings tabs present, Support page regression passed)
